title: DomainSnapshotReceived pseudocode regresses ui-tag-chip's tagAutocompleteVisibleFor stale-reference guard
description:
Iteration 3 expanded the DomainSnapshotReceived pseudocode (behavioral-spec.md §2 lines 122-147) and added a provenance table (lines 184-199) to fix FIND-SPEC-FILTER-015. While the expansion is now explicit, the new prescription contradicts the existing feedReducer.ts implementation for one field: `tagAutocompleteVisibleFor`.

The existing pure reducer (promptnotes/src/lib/feed/feedReducer.ts:62-66) implements a stale-reference guard:
```
tagAutocompleteVisibleFor:
  state.tagAutocompleteVisibleFor !== null &&
  snapshot.noteMetadata[state.tagAutocompleteVisibleFor] !== undefined
    ? state.tagAutocompleteVisibleFor
    : null,
```
This was introduced by ui-tag-chip so that when the note hosting an open tag-input is deleted (note disappears from snapshot), the input automatically closes.

The new ui-filter-search spec drops this guard:
  - §2 line 141: `tagAutocompleteVisibleFor: state.tagAutocompleteVisibleFor`  (straight pass-through)
  - §2 line 196 provenance table: `tagAutocompleteVisibleFor | state.tagAutocompleteVisibleFor | Preserved from previous state`

An implementer following this spec literally would either (a) replace the existing guard with straight pass-through (regressing ui-tag-chip behavior — REQ-TAG handlers would now retain stale autocomplete IDs across delete) or (b) refuse to follow the spec, in which case the spec is wrong.

This is a high-severity defect because:
1. It contradicts an already-shipped feature.
2. It creates a Phase 2c risk: a refactor that follows the spec breaks ui-tag-chip's regression baseline (verification-architecture §5 lists `dom/TagFilterSidebar.dom.vitest.ts` and tag tests as must-stay-green).
3. Done item 4 ('FeedViewState contains searchQuery and sortDirection; both are preserved across DomainSnapshotReceived') passes, but the DomainSnapshotReceived case as a whole is now mis-specified.

evidence.snippet:
§2 line 141: tagAutocompleteVisibleFor: state.tagAutocompleteVisibleFor,  // ── preserved from previous state
§2 line 196 provenance table: | `tagAutocompleteVisibleFor` | `state.tagAutocompleteVisibleFor` | Preserved from previous state |

feedReducer.ts:62-66 (existing): tagAutocompleteVisibleFor: state.tagAutocompleteVisibleFor !== null && snapshot.noteMetadata[state.tagAutocompleteVisibleFor] !== undefined ? state.tagAutocompleteVisibleFor : null

remediation:
Update §2 pseudocode line 141 and the provenance table row 196 to capture the existing stale-reference guard. Suggested:
```
tagAutocompleteVisibleFor:
  state.tagAutocompleteVisibleFor !== null &&
  snapshot.noteMetadata[state.tagAutocompleteVisibleFor] !== undefined
    ? state.tagAutocompleteVisibleFor
    : null,
```
Provenance table: Provenance = 'Preserved if note still exists in snapshot; nulled otherwise'. Add a note that this is inherited from ui-tag-chip and ui-filter-search must not regress it.
